sidebarDescription: Browse by category when you know the capability family, or stay in discover mode to see the editorial shelves.
heroTitle: Browse product-shaped MCP apps, not disconnected tool listings.
heroSubtitle: Discover public app surfaces, compare capability families, and jump straight into the chat, terminal, docs, or runtime view that matters.
